headline: Assessing Enphase Energy (ENPH) Valuation After Class Action Lawsuits And Solar Margin Pressures
summary: Enphase Energy (ENPH) is back in focus as multiple securities fraud class action lawsuits challenge its past comments on inventory management and expiring solar tax credits, while higher solar component costs pressure margins across the wider sector. See our latest analysis for Enphase Energy. The recent class action headlines and tariff driven cost pressures come on top of a sharp 28.05% 30 day share price return decline and a 39.90% one year total shareholder return decline, extending an...
